programme.title: Chicago P.D.
programme.desc: Ruzek's future with the unit is in question after a botched undercover job; a corpse is discovered in an SUV; Lindsay and Halstead move forward with their relationship.

Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Chicago P.D.
programme.sub-title: A Dead Kid, a Notebook and a Lot of Maybes
programme.desc: Intelligence searches for a missing teen who they believe poses a threat to students at his school; Atwater wants to make a good impression on a police captain.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Chicago P.D.
programme.desc: When Intelligence follows up on a tip Antonio and Halstead received from a reliable informant about an upcoming drug trade, the team is shocked to discover the mutilated body of a man; upon further investigation, the body is identified as a government official and when Olinsky, Ruzek, Lindsay and Halstead question the man's acquaintances they discover he had access to very important devices; Burgess helps plan a surprise for Platt.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Chicago P.D.
programme.desc: A decapitated corpse found in Lake Michigan is connected to Voight's social circle; Roman makes a grave error; Antonio makes a decision that could impact Michelle's future -- without consulting Olinsky.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Chicago P.D.
programme.desc: A doctor connected to Voight is investigated after four patients with chemo overdoses are sent to Chicago Med; Platt and Burgess work to clear Roman's name.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.
programme.desc: A teenage girl is violated during a home invasion; Voight helps a former acquaintance; Platt and Mouch receive upsetting news regarding their upcoming wedding.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.
programme.desc: Voight wants to make his former cellmate a confidential informant as the unit tries to take down a big cocaine supplier and local dealers; Burgess makes a decision about her relationship with Ruzek; Roman works with Firehouse 51 to fund a wedding.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Chicago P.D.
programme.desc: Lindsay goes undercover in hopes of finding a police officer who targets women leaving a local casino; Burgess needs Platt's approval to move forward with her plan; Antonio offers to take Roman's place in an upcoming boxing match.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.
programme.sub-title: The Song of Gregory Williams Yates
programme.desc: After escaping from a New York prison, convicted killer Gregory Yates (Dallas Roberts) heads to Chicago; SVU members Benson and Tutuola help investigate a triple homicide in Chicago; the team seeks a connection between Yates and a missing woman.

programme.desc: The already frantic search for a missing diabetic boy becomes more urgent when he is spotted with a couple known for child endangerment and pornography.

programme.desc: When a controversial misogynistic comic is accused of rape, Benson is happy to arrest him, but Barba feels the case is weak.

programme.desc: Three young girls' search for a mythical character leads to one of them becoming injured and the other two disappearing.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A feud between a famous author (Robert Vaughn) and his sixth wife, Charmaine (Marcia Cross), turns into a criminal case when Charmaine is faced with allegations of abuse; Barba winds up dealing with family drama of his own.

programme.title: Live: Premier League Soccer
programme.desc: Everton and Liverpool meet for a Merseyside derby as part of the Premier League Matchweek 33 at the Hill Dickinson Stadium. Entering this fixture, Liverpool is battling for a top-four finish, while Everton occupies a mid-table position.
